# Payzoris
> Virtual cards, infinite possibilities.

Payzoris lets you create secure virtual cards instantly for online shopping, subscriptions, and business expenses. Control spending, protect your real card details, and manage finances from one sleek dashboard.

## Key Features

- **Instant Virtual Cards**: Generate unlimited virtual cards in seconds with unique numbers, CVV, and spending limits.
- **Spend Control**: Set per-card limits, lock or freeze instantly, get real-time transaction notifications.
- **Privacy First**: Real card details stay hidden. Each virtual card acts as a shield against fraud.
- **Multi-Device**: Manage cards from web, iOS, and Android with seamless sync.
- **No Hidden Fees**: Transparent pricing with zero annual fees.
- **Global Acceptance**: Use anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted.

## Pages

- Home: https://payzoris.lepem.xyz/
